nasb.text: These are the living beings that I saw beneath the God of Israel by the river Chebar; so I knew that they were cherubim.

esv.text: These were the living creatures that I saw underneath the God of Israel by the Chebar canal; and I knew that they were cherubim.

cnv.text: 這些是我在迦巴魯河邊所看見、在以色列　神榮耀下面的活物，我就知道他們是基路伯。

ccb.text: 这些是我在迦巴鲁河边所看见的活物，他们在以色列上帝的下面。我知道他们是基路伯天使。
